creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194049
Fix

Some times ago, a fix [1] that unbreaks some drivers was committed into libsigrok, but no release was rolled since then by upstream.  Because these devices do not work without this patch, it may make sense to add it to the FreeBSD ports tree.

The patch from the Pull-Request does not apply to the 0.5.0 version of libsigrok.  The attached patch is a backport of the fix that applies cleanly.

References:
1. https://github.com/sigrokproject/libsigrok/pull/6
